results.matched_effect_cluster: Angular Steering rotation in activation 2D subspace
results.justification: EXACT TWIN — rotation in fixed 2D subspace with bounded angle is DERVISH-RING core mechanism.

results.matched_effect_cluster: Spherical Steering geometry-aware rotation + vMF gating
results.justification: EXACT TWIN — geometry-aware activation rotation training-free; identical core.
Multi-layer norm-preserving steering with discriminative layer selection is direct twin of multi-layer concentric rings.
Layer-selection criterion for steering covers calibrated layer-wise progression.
Token-specific steering coefficients covers calibrated angular θ_L per layer.
Local linearity LOC framework covers calibrated cross-layer steering.
Weighted multi-vector activation steering covers calibrated per-layer angle progression.
Compositional affine steering generalises vectors to conceptors — covers calibrated layer steering.
